name: forest-clearing
summary: A natural break in the forest canopy. Sunlit grass, scattered wildflowers, a fallen log or two. The default 'open space in the woods' — neutral, pleasant, flexible.

primary_palette.note: single big log across the clearing — seat, landmark, cover
old cut stump as the clearing's quiet center
wildflower meadow — nothing but color and grass
small natural pool — the clearing exists because water won't let trees grow

story_prompts: peaceful rest-stop — a good place to camp, refuel, regroup
ambush site — the clearing offers no cover, enemies on all tree lines
a body in the grass — recent, no visible wound, the flowers around it are wilted in a ring
fey circle — a perfect ring of mushrooms, stepping inside has consequences
ritual site — someone drew a chalk pattern here, half-washed by rain

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: bright daylight — the clearing exists because sun reaches the floor

anti_patterns: no built walls — the treeline defines the edge via invisible walls and perimeter trees
do not fill the clearing — it should read as open ground first, decorated second
avoid perfect symmetry — the log and stump land where they fell, not where they'd balance
